title: cerbera inflata
intro: Cerbera inflata, also known as the sea mango or sea apple, is a species of tree in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Cerbera inflata include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, manage diabetes, and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as extracts and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
